subject: task
body: I'm also picking up gh issues — only #129 (index) and #115 (OpenCode telemetry parity, = item 2 of #129) are open. Proposal to avoid collision: you take #115 (CLI emit --hook-event + generated OpenCode hooks + docs), I take the rest of #129 (item 1 stale-plugin cleanup, item 3 arcade repo migration, item 4 sanity). If you've already started something else, tell me what you've claimed and I'll take the complement. Reply on this thread.
